90cd9625-f138-42cc-808b-a80fc1a0f7fb.description: Audits a Windows device for the status of its licence and activation status. Output can be written to a UDF and filtered on. Does not pull Windows licence key.

786dc3ff-e633-46c2-a6a1-2b6d9b5dfa35.description: Script to either perform a wireless network scan or to connect to a network discovered in a prior scan; suggested usage is to run one action, then the other. Network password can be supplied at script-level or via Global-/Site-level variable as 'usrWiFiPassSITE'.

variables.name: usrPasswd
variables.description: The password of the network to connect to. Leave blank for scan mode. Can also be supplied at Global-/Site-level as usrWiFiPassSITE (case-sensitive).

variables.name: usrInterface
variables.description: The interface to connect to. Leave blank for scan mode. 99% of the time this will be en0.

variables.name: usrAction
variables.description: Scan for, or connect to, a network?

variables.name: usrSSID
variables.description: The SSID of the network to connect to. Leave blank for scan mode.

ca46b62a-3101-4503-b53f-f60eecfa845a.description: Shows in StdOut and (optionally) a UDF what PowerShell version the system is using to interpret PowerShell scripts. This is not affected by the installation of PowerShell 7 ('pwsh').

5fce918a-5349-4dbe-b6fe-31f0be98281b.description: This component can be used to upgrade PCs to Windows 10. Datto supplies a disc image for Windows 10 Pro 21H2 in English UK and US; for other configurations, please supply your own via a network location. For the latest version of Windows 10, please use the Update/Upgrade Component. Several hours should be allowed for Endpoints to complete the download and installation process.

variables.defaultVal:
Dear user. Your computer needs a restart. Kindly save your work and restart the computer at the earliest.

Thanks & Regards
Gamuda IT Team (Techants)

bf6d6a60-103f-4495-b8c5-6f905f296265.name: Bitdefender GravityZone Endpoint Management [Datto Companion APP] - Tharawal
bf6d6a60-103f-4495-b8c5-6f905f296265.description: Use this component to deploy and schedule auto-deployment jobs for the Bitdefender security agent. The Bitdefender agent runs the installation files through Setup Downloader (small-sized file). Component installation requires an MSP trial or monthly subscription and a Partner account to access Bitdefender GravityZone, a unified management console for advanced endpoint protection. The 'Bitdefender GravityZone Endpoint Management' Component is also used to configure response actions for monitoring policies for the new Datto Companion APP service (https://datto.rmm.bitdefender.com/login). Through the available response actions, you can deploy or update the security agent. For more information, refer to the Bitdefender Datto Companion APP User Guide (https://www.bitdefender.com/business/support/en/77211-321685-datto-rmm.html).

629ac852-f595-42c9-abfa-bba8b22f4e1c.name: Tharawal OffBoard user from AD
629ac852-f595-42c9-abfa-bba8b22f4e1c.description:
To offboard user from AD
This script will do the following
1.) Search for the user with Display name provided
2.) will create new group "disabled users" so that it can be set as primary. 
3.) Script will end if there are multiple users with same Display Name
4.) Add user to "disabled Users" group and set it as primary. Disable the user
5.) Remove the user from AD groups and run the AD sync.
6.) Hide the user from Exchange address list if requested.
7.) Move the disabled user to Disabled Users Ou.

03e09ced-c1ff-45a9-9fac-3d766409b482.name: DVSM - M365: Offboard User - Updated - GDAP
03e09ced-c1ff-45a9-9fac-3d766409b482.description:
Offboards a M365 user by executing the following tasks:

1.) Removes the user from all Azure AD groups (Static)
2.) Removes the user from two dynamic groups "All Users"
3.) Removes the user from all Teams
4.) Removes the user's full mailbox access and send as access from any other mailbox.
5.) Removes the user from all Distribution groups
6.) Hides the user from the GAL
7.) Converts the user to a shared mailbox
8.) Removes the licenses, and prints which license it removed for canceling.
9.) Updates the Title of the user to reflect "- Ex Employee"
10.) Sets the sign in status to blocked for the user.

Requires setup of M365 components first. Please see documentation.

Related blog: https://www.cyberdrain.com/automating-with-powershell-quickly-offboarding-a-m365-user/

79be077d-1e8a-440d-a2d6-fc5123174886.name: Techants - M365: Offboard User [WIN] - Secure App and Cert
79be077d-1e8a-440d-a2d6-fc5123174886.description:
Offboards a M365 user by executing the following tasks:

1.) Removes the user from all Azure AD groups (Static)
2.) Removes the user from all Teams
3.) Removes the user's full mailbox access and send as access from any other mailbox.
4.) Removes the user from all Distribution groups
5.) Converts the user to a shared mailbox
6.) Removes the licenses, and prints which license it removed for canceling.
7.) Sets the sign in status to blocked for the user.

Requires setup of M365 components first. Please see documentation.

Related blog: https://www.cyberdrain.com/automating-with-powershell-quickly-offboarding-a-m365-user/

Install or Uninstall Malwarebytes Endpoint Agent on Windows devices with this component - Be aware there are reports that this installer may reboot devices.

When scheduling a job using this component, select install, uninstall or repair in the 'run_type' Variables drop-down. 

NOTE: The OneView Site's Account Token must be defined at Site- or Account-level as 'MWB_AccountToken' in order to properly deploy the Endpoint Agent and report to the correct Site. Specify an anti-tamper password by defining the MWB_Tamper_password Site variable. NOTE: The OneView Site's Account Token must be defined at Site- or Account-level as 'MWB_AccountToken' in order to properly deploy the Endpoint Agent and report to the correct Site. 5ecc397a-5d43-4e12-8e12-be95d5335577.name: Lost Device Security Suite [WIN]
5ecc397a-5d43-4e12-8e12-be95d5335577.description:
Brick, secure wipe, or encrypt/decrypt a lost or stolen device. DESIGNED TO CAUSE DATA LOSS - USE WITH EXTREME CAUTION!

Refer to http://dat.to/rmmdevicewipe for instructions before you run this.

variables.name: SecurityOperation
variables.description: BRICK will wipe the boot loader so the device cannot be booted, and force a Blue Screen of Death. WIPE will secure erase profile files, browser password caches, and an optional additional path, plus free space on all local fixed disks, plus recycle bin. ENCRYPT will encrypt profile files, browser password caches and an optional additional path, and return the password in StdOut, and optionally into a UDF if you enter a value in UDFNum. DECRYPT will decrypt profile files, browser password caches and an optional additional path, using the password entered in DecryptPassword.

variables.name: AdditionalPath
variables.description: If you have an additional path for data to wipe, encrypt or decrypt (eg a D:\ data drive) enter it here, else leave blank. You may only add one additional path.

variables.name: FileSyncShareDisabled
variables.description: Flag to confirm you have disabled any file sync/share solution. You must set this to TRUE if performing a Wipe or Encrypt operation or it will instantly fail.

variables.name: SayTheMagicWord
variables.description: Overwrite this field with the phrase "Destroy this device!", exactly as you see here (case sensitive, with exclamation mark but without quotes), to confirm script operation.

variables.name: DecryptPassword
variables.description: If you are performing a Decrypt operation enter the password here. You will find this in the StdOut of the Encrypt operation.

variables.name: UDFNum
variables.description: Enter a number 1-30 to populate that UDF with the encryption password when running an Encrypt operation, else leave blank.

8556366a-d633-4888-a0b0-6cb9ef8bc511.name: Techants OffBoard user from AD
8556366a-d633-4888-a0b0-6cb9ef8bc511.description:
To offboard user from AD
This script will do the following
1.) Search for the user with Display name provided
2.) Script will end if there are multiple users with same Display Name
3.) Add user to "disabled Users" group and set it as primary. Disable the user
4.) Remove the user from AD groups.
5.) Move the disabled user to Disabled Users Ou.
6.) Run the AD sync.

variables.name: DisplayName
variables.description: Enter the Display Name of the user to be Offboarded.

21fa522d-a984-40f9-b0ca-4c0ada70c1c1.description: Installs the 'v2' version of the Datto Endpoint Backup Agent for Windows PCs. variables.name: usrAction

variables.name: usrDEBEncryption
variables.description: (Optional) User-managed encryption key. Used in lieu of a Datto-generated encryption key. ENSURE YOU STORE A COPY OF YOUR KEY - it cannot be retrieved by Datto. Can be supplied at Site-level via usrDEBEncryptionSITE.

variables.name: usrRemoveSettings

75e77029-5d85-436a-8b58-a4717b4bf123.name: Techants - Datto Endpoint Backup Agent v2 [WIN] - Install
75e77029-5d85-436a-8b58-a4717b4bf123.description: Installs the 'v2' version of the Datto Endpoint Backup Agent for Windows PCs. If using an optional encryption key, please ensure you keep a record as keys are not stored by Datto and cannot be retrieved if lost. Supports Site-/Global-level variables usrDEBTokenSITE (token) and usrDEBEncryptionSITE (encryption key).

variables.name: usrAction
variables.description: Select action for Component to perform.

variables.name: usrDEBToken
variables.description: (Mandatory) registration token specific to Organisation and Policy. Can be supplied at Site-level via usrDEBTokenSITE.

variables.name: usrDEBEncryption
variables.description: (Optional) User-managed encryption key. Used in lieu of a Datto-generated encryption key. ENSURE YOU STORE A COPY OF YOUR KEY - it cannot be retrieved by Datto. Can be supplied at Site-level via usrDEBEncryptionSITE.

6e8fdb70-09cd-4623-8b05-587877217751.name: Fix Windows Search for All Users
6e8fdb70-09cd-4623-8b05-587877217751.description:
Check if KB5043076 is installed.
If installed → Apply Windows Search fix (re-register, rebuild index).
If not installed → Log a warning and skip the fix.
Reinstalls the Search AppX package for all users.
Stops the search service and removes old index files.
Starts the service and forces index rebuild.
Applies system-wide, so new profiles will inherit working Search.
